sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_data (id Int32, ts DateTime, text_field String, numeric_field Float64) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_data VALUES (1, now(), 'Sample text', 123.456);
INSERT INTO test_data VALUES (2, '2023-10-01 10:00:00', NULL, NULL);
INSERT INTO test_data VALUES (3, toDateTime(1633046400), 'Another sample', 456.789);
SELECT toString(tupleElement((SELECT toString(numeric_field) FROM test_data WHERE id = 1), 1), 'Asia/Yekaterinburg') AS converted_string;
SELECT a.id, a.ts, a.text_field, toString(a.numeric_field) AS string_numeric FROM test_data AS a WHERE a.numeric_field IS NOT NULL;
SELECT a.id, a.ts, toString(a.text_field) AS text_string, toString(toUnixTimestamp(a.ts)) AS unix_time FROM test_data AS a WHERE a.text_field LIKE '';
SELECT a.id, toString(a.ts) AS formatted_time, COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY toDate(a.ts)) AS daily_count FROM test_data AS a GROUP BY a.id, formatted_time HAVING daily_count > 1;
SELECT a.id, a.ts, a.text_field, NULLIF(toString(a.numeric_field), '') AS non_empty_string FROM test_data AS a JOIN (SELECT id FROM test_data WHERE numeric_field IS NOT NULL) AS b ON a.id = b.id;
SELECT toString(avg(toFloat64(numeric_field))) AS avg_numeric_string FROM test_data WHERE text_field IS NOT NULL GROUP BY text_field ORDER BY avg_numeric_string;
SELECT a.id, toString(toUnixTimestamp(a.ts)) AS unix_seconds, b.numeric_field FROM test_data AS a LEFT JOIN test_data AS b ON a.id = b.id WHERE toString(a.ts) IS NOT NULL;
SELECT DISTINCT toString(a.ts) AS distinct_time FROM test_data AS a WHERE a.text_field IS NOT NULL;
